message:
feat: add e2e tests for ntm grep command

Comprehensive end-to-end test suite for the ntm grep (code search)
functionality, covering:

- GrepResult and GrepMatch structs matching CLI JSON output
- GrepListResult for -l flag output parsing
- GrepTestSuite extending TestSuite with grep-specific helpers

Build tag: //go:build e2e ensures these tests only run with
explicit e2e tag (go test -tags=e2e).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
